answers.where: Hangar pad in a bright Roblox-like block arena.
answers.action: Press BATTLE; shoulder module is visibly locked as the next mech goal.
answers.response: The old orange wire hardpoint markers are gone; the mech has lit mesh rails, sockets, vents, and top modules attached to the source GLB.
answers.reward: Salvage remains the resource to unlock/attach modules.
answers.game_look: Bright toy block world, readable engine-font HUD, sourced CC0 mech body, and mesh-rendered modular parts.

issues.text: Hero mech now uses mesh-rendered module rails and slots instead of shape debug circles, but the base downloaded asset still needs a stronger final sourced/rigged mech replacement.

problem: Some small top modules are still kitbashed over a single downloaded GLB rather than a fully authored/rigged hero model.
next: Source or author a stronger modular/rigged Roblox-like hero mech asset and replace the current single-mesh base.
